old_value: {"id":"voidlock-r8dn5","title":"InteractionBehavior auto-collects objectives in Prologue tutorial","description":"During the Prologue tutorial, the 'move' step sends the unit to the objective room. When the unit arrives at the objective cell, InteractionBehavior auto-starts channeling to collect the disk — before the player can follow the 'pickup' tutorial step. This leaves the tutorial stuck. ObjectiveBehavior correctly bails out for Prologue (line 53 of ObjectiveBehavior.ts), but InteractionBehavior's objective interaction section (line 68+ of InteractionBehavior.ts) has no such guard. Fix: in Prologue, require an explicit PICKUP command before InteractionBehavior starts channeling on objectives.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"git@kamyk.me","created_at":"2026-03-22T04:31:55Z","created_by":"Roman Kamyk","updated_at":"2026-03-22T04:31:55Z"}

new_value: Fixed: Added MissionType.Prologue guard in InteractionBehavior objective section. In Prologue, objectives require an explicit PICKUP command — no auto-collection. Regression test in regression_r8dn5_prologue_auto_collect.test.ts.
